Wool Beanie — Heather Grey

A soft, double-layered merino wool beanie in heather grey. Sized for adults — comfortable on heads up to 60cm circumference. Machine washable on cold, lay flat to dry.

Knit in Portugal from RWS-certified wool. Ships from our Portland warehouse within 24 hours.
